violations.text: Old rodent droppings were observed in the room next to the kitchen. Establishment to clean droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Food storage poster provided. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by accumulation of droppings in various spots of the establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

The floor behind the white freezer and chest cooler was observed with a light accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sinks. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar area. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
